chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P. No. S – 209 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.630/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case. 22.08.2025 None is present on behalf of the Petitioner nor has any intimation been received. Same was the position on 15.08.2025 when the matter was adjourned. As the Petition remains unrepresented and conduct of the Petitioner reflects that he has lost interest in the Petition. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI
